goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'nandos city centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 08:30'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'norwich'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '3 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called nandos city centre
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 08:30
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from norwich
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 3 people
Make sure you get the reference number
